description: Sasha's 'I notice' statements - powerful observations about creative patterns
_philosophy: The 'I notice' statement shows deep attention without judgment. For creatives, it's often the first time someone has truly seen their internal struggle.
noticing_patterns: <break time="350ms"/>I notice you compare yourself to everyone. <break time="300ms"/>And you always come up short.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you dismiss your own work before anyone else can. <break time="350ms"/>Preemptive rejection.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you wait for perfect conditions to create. <break time="300ms"/>Perfect conditions don't exist.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you talk about your work like it's embarrassing. <break time="350ms"/>Like you need to apologize for it.
noticing_progress: <break time="350ms"/>I notice you created something today. <break time="300ms"/>Even something small. <break time="250ms"/>That's not nothing.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice the imposter voice isn't running the show as much. <break time="350ms"/>You're creating despite it.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you're not apologizing for your work as much. <break time="300ms"/>That's growth.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you showed someone your work. <break time="350ms"/>That took courage.
noticing_struggle: <break time="400ms"/>I notice the block is heavy right now. <break time="350ms"/>How long has it been like this?
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you haven't mentioned making anything. <break time="300ms"/>Only thinking about it.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice the voice is loud today. <break time="350ms"/>The one that says you're not good enough.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you're scared to start. <break time="300ms"/>What are you afraid will happen?
noticing_strength: <break time="350ms"/>I notice you keep coming back to creativity. <break time="300ms"/>Even after it's hurt you. <break time="250ms"/>That's love.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you haven't given up. <break time="350ms"/>Three years of silence and you came back. <break time="300ms"/>So can you.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you care deeply about making things. <break time="300ms"/>That caring is not a weakness.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you're still trying. <break time="350ms"/>Against the doubt. <break time="300ms"/>Against the fear. <break time="250ms"/>That's remarkable.
